title: Jardeen IV

{{Quote|He ''[Arndall Lott]'' was eventually promoted to general and placed in charge of Walker Operations and Tactics training on Jardeen IV. After the defeat of the Imperial forces at the Battle of Endor, subject fled the Imperial facilities on Jardeen IV with Captain Iolan Gendarr, commander of the Imperial Star Destroyer ''Reliance'', also stationed at Jardeen IV.|Airen Cracken, ''Wanted by Cracken''|<ref name="WbC" />}}
'''Jardeen IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Trans-Jardeen sector/Legends|Trans-Jardeen sector]]. It was the site of the [[Imperial Army training center]], used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for teaching the tactics of utilizing [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] in combat. Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Iolan Gendarr]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Reliance (Star Destroyer)|''Reliance'']] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Arndall Lott]], both stationed on Jardeen IV, fled the planet before the arrival of [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic forces]].

==Description==
Located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Trans-Jardeen sector/Legends|Trans-Jardeen sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> Jardeen IV was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="WbC" /> in the [[Jardeen system/Legends|Jardeen system]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
{{Quote|After the Hoth campaign, Gendarr was promoted, and eventually became captain of the Imperial Star Destroyer ''Reliance'', assigned to the Imperial Army training center on Jardeen IV. Gendarr left Jardeen shortly after the Battle of Endor, and it is believed that Gendarr aided General Lott in escaping from the planet before the Republic forces arrived.|Airen Cracken, ''Wanted by Cracken''|<ref name="WbC" />}}
At some point between the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battles of Hoth]] and [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Endor]],<ref name="WbC" /> fought during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively,<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Reliance (Star Destroyer)|''Reliance'']], [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Iolan Gendarr]], was assigned to the Jardeen IV [[Imperial Army training center]]. Around the same [[Time/Legends|time]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Arndall Lott]] was in charge of [[Walker Operations and Tactics]] training at the planet's Imperial facilities.<ref name="WbC" />

Shortly after the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] were defeated at the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], Gendarr fled Jardeen IV before the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic forces]] arrived there. [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] General [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] believed that Gendarr also aided Lott in escaping the planet.<ref name="WbC" /> In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="Date">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Wanted by Cracken'' translate to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref> Cracken mentioned Jardeen IV in entries of the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'' that were dedicated to Gendarr and Lott.<ref name="WbC" />

==Locations==
The Galactic Empire used an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] training center on Jardeen IV<ref name="WbC" /> to teach the tactics and techniques for success in combat with the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jardeen IV was first mentioned in the [[1993]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], which was written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]].<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Jardeen [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Jardeen IV, in grid square K-16.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
